title: Index : Roy D. Graves Photograph Collection : oral history transcript / and related material, 1963-1964
creator: Graves, Roy D. (Roy Daniel), 1889-1971. ive
Regional Cultural History Project (University of California, Berkeley)
Baum, Willa K
description: Descriptions of the photographs in the collection, made by Mr. Graves in the fall of 1963

Also: a biographical interview recounting his various occupations and the beginning of his interest in picture collecting and photography; an autobiographical sketch; photographs of Mr. Graves; a statistical count of the number of photographs in the collection; and clippings
subject: Photographs -- Catalogs
